creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to amendlik from comment #27)

The following will fail:

PubkeyAuthentication no
ChallengeResponseAuthentication no
PasswordAuthentication no
KerberosAuthentication no
GSSAPIAuthentication yes
UsePAM no

GSSAPIAuthentication is Heimdal.

My sshd is the system sshd.

root     1965   0.0  0.1    21868  11024  -  Is   06:31     0:00.00 sshd: /usr/sbin/sshd [listener] 0 of 10-100 startups (sshd)

Again, please try the workaround. This will tell us a lot.
